name: 11L Int4-MLP QAT + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(frac=0.4)
blurb: 11 layers with int4 QAT for MLP (clip_range=7) and int6 for attention. STE fake quantization during training makes model robust to int4 precision. BigramHash 10240, SmearGate, SWA start_frac=0.4, 5% MLP magnitude pruning, zstd-22. Built on thwu1 SOTA.
author: aravhawk
